agb.title: General Terms and Conditions for Insurance Brokers
agb.subtitle: Healio GmbH – General Terms and Conditions for Insurance Brokers.
agb.section1Title: 1. Subject of Contract per Broker Agreement
agb.section1p1: The insurance broker agreement, incorporating these General Terms and Conditions (GTC), applies only to the private-law insurance contracts expressly named in the broker agreement for which brokerage services were requested or management was transferred to the broker.
agb.section1p2: It may be separately agreed that the mandate extends to insurance relationships existing at the time of conclusion of this agreement.
agb.section1p3: No other or further obligation to act or advise exists beyond the scope defined herein.
agb.section1p4: If the client concludes an insurance contract through another intermediary after the conclusion of this agreement, the present broker agreement does not extend to that contract.
agb.section1p5: If the client wishes the broker to arrange an additional insurance contract after conclusion of the present broker agreement, the present broker agreement also extends to this advice.
agb.section1p6: This insurance broker agreement relates only to the advice on and brokerage of insurance contracts pursuant to §34d GewO.
agb.section2Text: The client is obligated to cooperate, in particular to provide truthful information promptly and completely.
agb.section3Text: The broker assumes liability for the proper fulfilment of duties within the framework of statutory provisions.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously.
datenschutz.section1Text: The party responsible for data processing on this website is:
datenschutz.serverLogsText: The hosting provider automatically collects and stores information in server log files.
datenschutz.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via our contact form, your details will be stored for the purpose of processing the inquiry.
datenschutz.section3Text: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data.
datenschutz.section5Text: If you have any questions about data protection, please send us an email.
